final:
module flash_memory_cell (
    input wire D,
    input wire C,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (C) begin
            Q = D; // Update output with input when control is high
        end
        // If control is low, retain previous state: no change to Q
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (!C) begin
        Q <= ~D;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
